expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.textPrompt:
Write a structured research article on: 
{{1.fields.`Topic/Tittle Of Research`}}
Return ONLY valid JSON:

{
  "title": "",
  "introduction": "",
  "sections": [
    {
      "heading": "",
      "content": "",
      "image_query": ""
    }
  ],
  "conclusion": ""
}

Rules:
- image_query must be 2–4 words
- No URLs
- No markdown
- No explanations
-  Must be valid RFC8259 JSON
- No trailing commas
- No markdown fences
- If invalid JSON would occur, output empty strings instead
